# Develop Backend Data Modeling

Design and implement data model changes following project conventions.

## Process

1. Analyze requirements for schema changes
2. Design migrations with rollback strategy
3. Update ORM models
4. Add indexes for query patterns
5. Test with real database

## Related Standards

- data-modeling-standards — Schema conventions, migrations
- backend-standards — Repository patterns
